title: Elizabeth Warren questions MrBeast’s teen banking app over crypto concerns
summary_full: Senator Elizabeth Warren has formally questioned MrBeast's company, Beast Industries, regarding their new money app, Step, for young people. Concerns center on the app potentially encouraging cryptocurrency use among minors, with a video reportedly guiding children on how to discuss crypto with parents. The app's association with Evolve Bank and Trust, which faced Federal Reserve action, also raises safety questions.
